claim: With GitHub Copilot and AI agents, the work distribution for engineers is shifting: less coding, more planning and reviewing
actionable: Adapt your workflow assuming coding agents will handle implementation; spend more effort on writing clear specifications and thorough code review
source_title: Software Engineering Is Becoming Plan and Review

claim: Spending 5 minutes on detailed planning saves 30 minutes of reviewing AI-generated code
actionable: Invest heavily in PRDs and specifications before delegating to agents; the planning time pays off in faster, more accurate results
source_title: Software Engineering Is Becoming Plan and Review

claim: Front-end feature work is harder to plan fully; back-end features and migrations are easier to spec completely and test-drive
actionable: Use a plan-heavy approach for back-end development and migrations; use an iterative review-heavy approach for front-end work with agents
source_title: Software Engineering Is Becoming Plan and Review

claim: As agents run longer (5-10 minutes for a full feature), a 5-minute threshold emerges where context-switching overhead increases
actionable: Design your agent interface to support parallelization and batch waiting; do not expect engineers to watch agent logs for 5+ minute runs
source_title: Software Engineering Is Becoming Plan and Review

claim: When agents exceed 5-minute run times, parallelization becomes necessary—run multiple agents in parallel to avoid idle waiting time
actionable: Build interfaces that allow running multiple long-running agents in parallel; humans switch between reviewing completed work rather than waiting for one to finish
source_title: Software Engineering Is Becoming Plan and Review

claim: Agents running QA via Playwright MCP (clicking, testing) are the frontier; most mainstream development has not adopted this yet
actionable: Be aware that agent-driven QA is emerging but not yet widely adopted; do not assume your agents can reliably test UI interactions at scale
source_title: Software Engineering Is Becoming Plan and Review
